steps.title: Identify the contrast announced in the passage
steps.content: The passage opens with “though for different reasons” — clearly signaling that Katharine Kuh and Bernarda Bryson Shahn received the same award but for DIFFERENT reasons. After stating that Kuh was honored for her art history work, the transition must reflect this difference.

steps.title: Match the transition to the signal
steps.content:
By contrast directly signals the difference between the two women's reasons for receiving the award.

The other three choices don't signal contrast: as a result introduces causation, for instance introduces an example, and in other words suggests clarifying or restating.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
